title: Rapid Model Architecture Adaption for Meta-Learning

problem.description: Current NAS methods focus on single tasks with fixed hardware, but real deployments require multiple tasks and hardware platforms
problem.complexity: O(THC) where T=tasks, H=hardware platforms, C=constraints

methodology.approach: Integration of MAML framework into hardware-aware NAS

challenges_addressed: Over-parameterization in NAS search space causing overfitting
Prolonged profiling of latency for sub-networks
